title: elaphoglossum curvans
intro: Elaphoglossum curvans is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the curly Elaphoglossum or curly lip fern. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum curvans include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may aid in soothing coughs, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing. Elaphoglossum curvans is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to benefit from its medicinal properties.
